name: Execute

states.name: Page Structure
states.description: Core structural elements required for the Execute page to function: heading, library panel, and sequence builder panel.

states.name: Controls State
states.description: Control buttons should reflect the current state of the sequence builder, ensuring users cannot run an empty sequence.
states.precondition: No workflows have been added to the sequence builder

states.name: Page Purpose
states.description: The Execute page lets users queue multiple workflows into an ordered execution sequence, then run them all in batch. Users drag workflows from a searchable library into the sequence builder, reorder them, save named sequences for reuse, and configure stop-on-failure behavior.

description: Execute page — batch workflow execution with drag-and-drop sequence building
